headline: Wedbush Initiates Coverage On EPAM Systems with Neutral Rating, Announces Price Target of $99
summary: Wedbush  analyst Steven Wahrhaftig   initiates coverage on EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Neutral rating and announces Price Target of $99.
